name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [proc -> "idle"]

Next == \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "critical"]
        \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_proc

TypeOK == /\ proc \in [1..N]
          /\ state \in [proc -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes

Init == /\ state = [i \in Participants |-> "INIT"]
        /\ votes = [i \in Participants |-> "NONE"]

Prepare(i) == /\ state[i] = "INIT"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "PREPARED"]
              /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteYes(i) == /\ state[i] = "PREPARED"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "YES"]
              /\ UNCHANGED state

VoteNo(i) == /\ state[i] = "PREPARED"
             /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = "NO"]
             /\ UNCHANGED state

Commit == /\ state = [i \in Participants |-> "PREPARED"]
          /\ votes = [i \in Participants |-> "YES"]
          /\ state' = [i \in Participants |-> "COMMITTED"]
          /\ UNCHANGED votes

Abort == /\ state = [i \in Participants |-> "PREPARED"]
          /\ votes \in [i \in Participants |-> {"YES", "NO"}]
          /\ state' = [i \in Participants |-> "ABORTED"]
          /\ UNCHANGED votes

Next == \/ \E i \in Participants: Prepare(i)
        \/ \E i \in Participants: VoteYes(i)
        \/ \E i \in Participants: VoteNo(i)
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented by a set of indices. A fork is free if its index is in forks. *)
(* State is a mapping from philosopher indices to their state: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating". *)

Init == 
  /\ forks = 1..N
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates to determine adjacent forks for philosopher i *)
leftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
rightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Predicate to check if philosopher i can eat: both adjacent forks are free *)
canEat(i) == leftFork(i) \in forks /\ rightFork(i) \in forks

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "thinking"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks
    \/ /\ state[i] = "hungry"
       /\ canEat(i)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = forks \ {leftFork(i), rightFork(i)}
    \/ /\ state[i] = "eating"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = forks \cup {leftFork(i), rightFork(i)}
    \/ /\ state[i] = "hungry"
       /\ ~canEat(i)
       /\ state' = state
       /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]

Producer(x) == /\ size < K
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = q

Next == \/ \E x \in Nat : Producer(x)
       \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels

VARIABLES state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived

Init ==
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "initial"]
  /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
  /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
  /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "initial"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "finished"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = TRUE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "recording"
        /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = TRUE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "finished"
        /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "finished"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "finished"
        /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "finished"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "finished"
        /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = TRUE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "finished"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
        /\ state[i] = "finished"
        /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = TRUE
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "finished"]
        /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}  \* Example finite key set
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"} \* Example finite value set

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ Keys \subseteq DOMAIN store
          /\ Values \subseteq Values

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ Keys \subseteq DOMAIN store
        /\ Values \subseteq Values

Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
             /\ v \in Values
             /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ store' = store

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
       \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballot, chosen, acceptors, proposers

Init == ballot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ chosen = [i \in 1..M |-> 0] /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..M |-> 0]] /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [j \in 1..N |-> 0]]

Prepare(p, b) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [i \in 1..N |-> b]]
Accept(p, b, v) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [i \in 1..N |-> b]] /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..M |-> IF proposers[p][i] = b THEN v ELSE acceptors[i][j]]]
Chosen(p, v) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]] /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![p] = v]

Next == \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
  /\ b > ballot[p]
  /\ \E i \in 1..N: proposers[p][i] = b
  /\ \E i \in 1..N: acceptors[i][p] = v
  /\ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N: acceptors[i][p] = v
  /\ Chosen(p, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, chosen, acceptors, proposers>>
====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channel, retransmitCnt, sentChunks, seqNum

Init == /\ seqNum = 1
        /\ retransmitCnt = 0
        /\ sentChunks = {}
        /\ ackedChunks = {}
        /\ channel = {}

SendChunk == /\ seqNum \in 1 .. Len(File)
            /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {seqNum}
            /\ channel' = channel \cup {seqNum}
            /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
            /\ retransmitCnt' = 0

RetransmitChunk == /\ seqNum \in 1 .. Len(File)
                  /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                  /\ channel' = channel \cup {seqNum}
                  /\ seqNum' = seqNum
                  /\ retransmitCnt' = retransmitCnt + 1

ReceiveAck == /\ channel # {}
             /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup channel
             /\ channel' = {}

Next == \/ SendChunk
        \/ RetransmitChunk
        \/ ReceiveAck

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seqNum, retransmitCnt, sentChunks, ackedChunks, channel>>

(* Parameters *)
CONSTANT N, maxDrift, epsilon

(* Helper functions *)
Drift(c) == c + Random(-maxDrift, maxDrift)
Avg(c) == Sum(c) \div N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next state *)

        /\ avg' = Avg(clocks')
        /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg']
        /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

(* Property: after one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
AfterOneRound == /\ \E i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = Avg(clocks)
                /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

(* Theorem: after one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
THEOREM Spec => []AfterOneRound

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, T

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = {}

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[i]]
          /\ infected' = infected \cup known[i]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ p \in free
           /\ c \in Clients
        \/ /\ free' = free
           /\ allocated' = allocated
           /\ p \notin free
              /\ c \in Clients
              /\ allocated[c] = {}
        \/ /\ free' = free
           /\ allocated' = allocated
           /\ p \in free
              /\ c \notin Clients
           \/ /\ p \notin free
              /\ c \notin Clients

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
